title: poa abbreviata var. jordalii
intro: Poa abbreviata var. jordalii, also known as a type of grass, is a lesser-known subspecies within the Poa abbreviata species, a group of grasses in the family Poaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Poa abbreviata var. jordalii include its ability to soothe and calm irritated mucous membranes, making it a potential natural remedy for respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Poa abbreviata var. jordalii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed and utilized for therapeutic purposes.
